headlines.description: — Scottie Barnes had 28 points in a near triple-double, Immanuel Quickley added 25 points and the Toronto Raptors beat the Cleveland Cavaliers 126-113 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Scottie Barnes scores 28 in near triple-double, Raptors beat Cavaliers 126-113

headlines.description: — Devin Booker scored 33 points, Dillon Brooks added 32 and the Phoenix Suns won their fifth straight game by beating the Indiana Pacers 133-98 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Booker scores 33, Brooks adds 32 and the Suns roll to 5th straight win by beating Pacers 133-98

headlines.description: — Jalen Johnson had 31 points, 18 rebounds, 14 assists and seven steals, leading the Atlanta Hawks to a 132-122 victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Johnson leads the Hawks past the Jazz with a triple-double and a career-best effort
